summary: DMT V3 Limits Management - All 51 tests passed (25 backend + 26 frontend API tests)

design_issues.issue: No data-testid attributes found in the component. Consider adding data-testid for better E2E test targeting.

seed_data_creation: None required - tests use existing API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All DMT V3 Limits APIs tested and working correctly. Tests cover:

## Backend Tests (25 passed):
- DMT Global Limits API: GET/PUT /api/admin/dmt-limits with validation
- User DMT Usage API: GET /api/admin/user/{user_id}/dmt-usage
- DMT Service Toggle: POST /api/admin/service-toggles/dmt
- Levin DMT Health: GET /api/eko/levin-dmt/health
- Limit validation (daily <= weekly <= monthly, per_txn <= daily)

## Frontend API Tests (26 passed):
- All CRUD operations for DMT limits
- User usage tracking (daily/weekly/monthly)
- Service enable/disable toggle
- Integration tests for limit propagation

## Note:
Old dmt-admin-api.spec.ts was testing legacy v1 APIs which have been replaced. Archived as .bak and replaced with new v3 tests.

features_tested.DMT Service Toggle API: PASSED - Enable/Disable DMT service via POST /api/admin/service-toggles/dmt
features_tested.DMT Global Limits API PUT: PASSED - PUT /api/admin/dmt-limits updates all limits with validation
features_tested.DMT Limits Validation: PASSED - Rejects invalid limit hierarchy (daily > weekly, weekly > monthly, per_txn > daily)
features_tested.User DMT Usage API: PASSED - GET /api/admin/user/{user_id}/dmt-usage returns daily/weekly/monthly usage with remaining
features_tested.Levin DMT Health API: PASSED - GET /api/eko/levin-dmt/health returns healthy status with user_code 19560001
features_tested.Service Toggles List: PASSED - GET /api/admin/service-toggles includes DMT service with correct name
features_tested.Limits Integration: PASSED - Global limit changes reflect in user usage endpoint
